author: mysticryuujin
content:
For the gas, can we just update the client config in the json-rpc compact tests to set the same value on Nethermind?

For blockValue, I don't know off the top of my head

I think slotNumber it's probably not intentional, would have to double check.

And I would have to double check but I think the mempool test is SpecOnly so it just has to match the format/fields, not perfect match the values.
